title: HuBMAP TMC-Florida/Zurich CODEX  Modality Overview
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"74kh5","text":"This protocol is an overview of all of  the protocols currently in use for the  CODEX modality at HubMAP Tissue Mapping Center,TMC-Florida/Zurich.  It includes protocols.io links to each of the individual protocols that make up this project workflow, from processing tissue and  imaging the samples, to uploading the final data to the HuBMAP HIVE.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2o6rj","text":"This workflow protocol may be interupted at any point. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"226j0","text":"Steps are permitted to be performed in non-consecutive order.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8vjbe","text":"Repeated runs on the same sample do not require employing the entire protocol sequence.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"abb4q","text":"Confirm sample ID information at the start of each step.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8dlee","text":"Follow all safety guidelines provided with individual links within this protocol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"c1g8e","text":"Required materials are provided within each linked protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Process donor organs into samples for analysis. Lymph Node: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgnijve Thymus: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgmiju6 Spleen: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc3kiykw
Register organ donor, organs received and common coordinate region information in the HuBMAP UUID generator at https://uuid.hubmapconsortium.org .
Prepare paraffin blocks from tissue samples. Cassette Processing: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8nzhvf6 Paraffin Embedding: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bam9ic96
Prepare H&E sections for histopathological assessment. Sectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bahdib26 H&E Staining: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beamjac6
Validate antibodies in all target tissue types by IHC using DAB Staining: https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdiei4be
Coat coverslips with Poly-L-Lysine. Coverslip Preparation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.baxyifpw
Cut and mount sections for CODEX analysis. Sectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.basdiea6
Stain coverslips with Akoya invertoried antibodies. Staining: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbsdina6
Make CODEX bar coded reporter trays. Preparation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc2riyd6
Perform multiplex data acquisition using CODEX robot and Keyence microscope. Acquisition: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdifi4bn
Transfer images to analysis computer and perform CODEX processing. Codex_Processor.docx
​Register completed CODEX section information in the HuBMAP UUID generator at https://uuid.hubmapconsortium.org .
Prepare and upload data to the HuBMAP HIVE Globus using hipergator. Datasets to HiperGator-Globus.docx
creator: Marda Jorgensen
